title: lithospermum elenae
intro: Lithospermum elenae, also known as Elenae's gromwell, is a plant species within the borage family, Boraginaceae, that has been used for medicinal purposes for centuries. The plant contains compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum elenae include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds and respiratory issues. Lithospermum elenae can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its effects.
